name: giveabit-hq
description: Give A Bit HQ — ops glass with gate, vault, live metrics pipes

scripts.build: mkdir -p public/metrics public/schemas public/docs public/handoff && cp control-panel.html public/index.html && cp projects.json agents.json tools.json status.example.json manifest.webmanifest public/ && cp pages/_headers pages/_redirects public/ && cp -R metrics/. public/metrics/ && cp -R schemas/. public/schemas/ && cp docs/*.md public/docs/ 2>/dev/null; cp handoff/state.json public/handoff/ 2>/dev/null; (test -f status.json && cp status.json public/ || true)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./public --project-name=giveabit-hq
